name: indent-partial-direct
description: Style defines w:ind left=720 right=360 firstLine=240. Para 2 has direct w:ind left=1440 only. Per spec, absent attributes inherit from style individually.
expected_behavior: Para 1: left=720, right=360, firstLine=240 (all from style). Para 2: left=1440 (direct), right=360 (style), firstLine=240 (style). Para 3: left=0, right=0, firstLine=0 (all direct).
